teal.$description: Primary accent. Deep teal — the operational spine. Logos, icons, CTAs, active states. Hex reference #2F7F7F.

amber.$description: Secondary accent. Warm amber — the temperature break. Clinic-name type on the enrollment hero, completion states, the one warm moment per screen. Hex reference #C8943A.

paper.$description: Primary background. Warm off-white. Never pure white. Hex reference #FAF8F5.

surface.$description: Card / elevated surface on paper ground. Hex reference #F0EDE8.

border.$description: Dividers, card borders, table rules. Hex reference #DDD9D2.

muted.$description: Secondary text, captions, placeholder. Hex reference #A29B91.

tertiary.$description: Tertiary text, form-label subdued. Hex reference #6B6560.

ink.$description: Primary text / display. Warm near-black. Never pure black. Hex reference #3D3A37.

deep.$description: Deepest ink. Reserved for the dashboard sidebar surface. Hex reference #252220.

success.$description: Charge cleared, plan published. Muted sage-adjacent green — not Tailwind green-500. Hex reference #5B8F73.

warning.$description: Failed charge flag on member row. Uses the amber token — reuse signal over a new hue. Hex reference #C8943A.

danger.$description: Destructive confirmation, cancel-plan, stripe decline. Warm rust, not Tailwind red. Hex reference #B04B2C.

display.$description: Headings 32px and larger. Editorial authority; modern, not antique.

body.$description: All UI below 32px: body copy, labels, form fields, button text, captions.

mono.$description: Signature element. Reserved for financial figures only — MRR, ARR, break-even math, Stripe amounts, percentages, member counts. No other context.

space.$description: 4/8/12/16/24/32/40/64/96 scale. Tight where density signals craft (tables, captions). Generous where breathing signals quality (hero, card padding).

sm.$description: Data cards, inputs, table cells. Instrument-grade.

md.$description: Modals, larger cards, the CTA on the enrollment page.

full.$description: Avatars only. Never used on buttons.

shadow.$description: PawPlan uses borders, rules, and type weight for depth. Shadow is reserved for the one case where it is unavoidable (modals over paper).
